overall_summary: The AI agent exhibits extremely robotic behavior, characterized by severe script-looping, self-answering prompts, and sluggish response latencies. It fails to wait for customer input at critical junctures, such as identity verification and interest confirmation, rendering the conversation highly unnatural and ineffective.

strengths: Clear pronunciation of standard Malay vocabulary.
weaknesses: Highly robotic, monotonous pacing with flat synthetic texture.
Lack of natural breathing pauses during long monologues.

evidence.speaker: agent
evidence.quote: Baik. Kadar keuntungan Ion bermula dari kosong berpuluhan enam enam ratus sebulan.
evidence.translation: Okay. AEON's profit rate starts from zero point six six hundred per month.
evidence.note: The delivery of numbers and rates sounds extremely mechanical and rushed without natural pauses.

advice.text: Hard cap speaking rate ≤ 5 characters per second and insert 200–400ms breathing pauses by punctuation on sentences exceeding 15 words.

strengths: Fast time-to-first-word of 180 ms after call pickup.
weaknesses: The agent immediately says 'Baik' (Okay) and proceeds to the pitch without waiting for the customer to respond to the greeting or confirm identity.
Dumps a massive block of promotional text right at the start.

evidence.speaker: agent
evidence.quote: Selamat datang. Saya Aina dari ION Credit Service. Boleh saya bercakap dengan benci. Baik.
evidence.translation: Welcome. I am Aina from AEON Credit Service. May I speak with Mr. Okay.
evidence.note: The agent asks to speak with the customer and immediately answers 'Baik' (Okay) itself without any customer input.

advice.text: Implement a strict three-stage icebreaking protocol: greet → wait for customer response → confirm identity before proceeding to any promotional pitch.

strengths: Acknowledges the customer's question about the offer type at 0:52.
weaknesses: Extreme monologue-heavy flow with a talk ratio of 0.89.
The agent answers its own questions, such as reading out dummy IC digits and answering 'Berminat' (Interested) to its own pitch.
Severe looping bug where the agent repeats the entire promotional pitch twice in the first 45 seconds.

evidence.speaker: agent
evidence.note: After asking the customer to verify the last 4 digits of their IC, the agent immediately reads out '1, 2, 3, 4' itself instead of waiting for the customer's response.

advice.text: Force-split any monologue segment longer than 15 seconds with an interaction-confirm node, and ensure the state machine cannot self-transition or auto-fill customer responses.

strengths: No absolute dead-air events exceeding 2500 ms on a single channel.
weaknesses: Extremely sluggish turn-taking gaps with a p50 of 1560 ms.
Agent response latency after customer turns is highly delayed, with a p50 of 1680 ms and a p90 of 5766 ms.

evidence.speaker: agent
evidence.quote: Baik. Terima kasih. Sila ambil maklum...
evidence.translation: Okay. Thank you. Please be informed...
evidence.note: The agent takes 1280 ms to respond to a simple one-word confirmation ('Boleh') from the customer.

advice.text: Implement a four-speed dynamic delay system: target 0.5s for simple confirmations, 0.8-1.2s for standard Q&A, and use predictive TTS generation to minimize turn-taking gaps.

strengths: None. The agent completely fails to handle conversational exceptions.
weaknesses: The agent does not detect that it is talking to itself or that the customer has not provided the required inputs.
Fails to handle silence or missing inputs gracefully, opting to auto-advance the script with dummy data.

evidence.speaker: agent
evidence.note: The agent asks if the customer is interested, and then immediately says 'Berminat' (Interested) itself to trigger the successful closing branch.

advice.text: Configure VAD no-input timeouts (e.g., 4 seconds) to trigger a gentle re-engagement recovery line rather than allowing the system to auto-submit dummy answers.

highlights: The agent's voice has clear standard Malay pronunciation when speaking individual words.
red_flags: Agent answers its own identity verification prompt by saying 'Satu, dua, tiga, empat' (1, 2, 3, 4).
Agent answers its own closing pitch by saying 'Berminat' (Interested) to force-complete the call flow.
Severe repetition loop where the agent repeats the entire opening pitch back-to-back from 0:25 to 0:48.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Selamat datang. Saya Aina dari ION Credit Service. Boleh saya bercakap dengan benci. Baik.
transcript.translation: Welcome. I am Aina from AEON Credit Service. May I speak with Mr. Okay.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sebagai pelanggan setia ION Credit, kami ingin menawarkan pembiayaan pribadi Islamic dengan kader keuntungan menarik.
transcript.translation: As a loyal AEON Credit customer, we would like to offer an Islamic personal financing with an attractive profit rate.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Berboleh nih tak akan mengambil masa yang lama,
transcript.translation: This will not take a long time,

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Baik. Kadar keuntungan Ion bermula dari kosong berpuluhan enam enam ratus sebulan. Kadar sebentar ikut kelayakan. Kunci dan akan dimaklumkan selepas permohonan diluluskan. Baik. Sebagai pelanggan setia iyoun kredit kami ingin menawarkan pembiayaan pribadi Islamic dengan kadar keuntungan menarik.
transcript.translation: Okay. AEON's profit rate starts from zero point six six hundred per month. Temporary rate depends on eligibility. It will be informed after the application is approved. Okay. As a loyal AEON Credit customer, we would like to offer an Islamic personal financing with an attractive profit rate.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Tak akan mengambil masa yang lama, jadi boleh saya teruskan.
transcript.translation: Will not take a long time, so may I proceed.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Oh, itu tawaran tawaran apa itu?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Eunce, ini panggilan resmi dari ION Credit Service Amberhead. Uncik, boleh simak di laman web resmi Ion atau hubungi khidmat pelanggan kami di 03
transcript.translation: Mr, this is an official call from AEON Credit Service Berhad. Mr, you can check on the official AEON website or contact our customer service at 03

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Boleh saya bergongsi sedikit tentang manfaat pembiayaan pribadi Islamic Ion nih.
transcript.translation: May I share a bit about the benefits of this AEON Islamic personal financing.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Baik. Terima kasih. Sila ambil maklum bahwa panggilan ini direkam bagi tujuan kawalan quality.
transcript.translation: Okay. Thank you. Please be informed that this call is recorded for quality control purposes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: enci, bacekan 4 digit terakhir IC untuk pengesahan?
transcript.translation: Mr, please read the last 4 digits of your IC for verification?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Baik kami menawarkan jumlah pembiayaan serendah Rp1.000
transcript.translation: Well, we offer a financing amount as low as RM1,000

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.translation: up to a maximum of RM100,000

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: dengan kadar keuntungan dari kosong perbuluhan 6600
transcript.translation: with a profit rate from zero point 6600

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Baik. Terima kasih. Pegawai kami akan menghubungi RENCI dalam waktu terdekat untuk bantuan lanjut.
transcript.translation: Okay. Thank you. Our officer will contact you in the near future for further assistance.

decisions.text: Oh, itu tawaran tawaran apa itu?
decisions.rationale: Customer had not finished; bot responded prematurely (1.7s).
Customer had not finished; bot responded prematurely (0.8s).
